name: Chicken Margarita
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine cumin, chili powder, lime juice, garlic and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
2. Marinate chicken pieces in the mixture for twenty minutes.
3. Heat remaining oil in a heavy skillet.
4. Brown chicken pieces on all sides.
5. Add marinade, tequila and water to the skillet.
6. Transfer chicken pieces to a platter.
7. Reduce sauce over high heat until it reaches a good coating consistency, then pour over chicken.
